name: Jack
comment:
DTS Jack: High-power, compact, lightweight moving head.
Features a wide excursion motorized zoom allowing any application from long-throw projections to large wall washing.
Beam opening is:
1° – 2,5° ‘Beam’ projection;
2,5° – 37° ‘Spot’ projection;
38° – 46° ‘Wash’ projection
Generates a huge luminosity and extremely uniform projection using only a 189 W lamp.

Power consumption is just 230 W.

Fitted with the ‘FPR’ system. The ‘FPR’ (D.T.S. patent) allows limitless pan rotation, in either direction, never having to reverse motion.
